calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Laura Close, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Nathan Bradley Arel.
Minor's Father John Patrick Sorensen is also present in court.
Parties were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Nathan Patrick Close.
Decree signed in open court.
